mapper.select: SELECT id, name, logo, description, 0 AS product_count, sort_order, status, created_at, updated_at FROM brand WHERE status = 1 ORDER BY sort_order DESC, id ASC

SELECT b.id, b.name, b.logo, b.description, COUNT(p.id) AS product_count, b.sort_order, b.status, b.created_at, b.updated_at FROM brand b LEFT JOIN product p ON p.brand_id = b.id AND p.status = 1 WHERE b.status = 1 GROUP BY b.id, b.name, b.logo, b.description, b.sort_order, b.status, b.created_at, b.updated_at ORDER BY b.sort_order DESC, b.id ASC

SELECT b.id, b.name, b.logo, b.description, COUNT(p.id) AS product_count, b.sort_order, b.status, b.created_at, b.updated_at FROM brand b LEFT JOIN product p ON p.brand_id = b.id AND p.status = 1 WHERE b.status = 1 GROUP BY b.id, b.name, b.logo, b.description, b.sort_order, b.status, b.created_at, b.updated_at ORDER BY product_count DESC, b.sort_order DESC, b.id DESC

SELECT b.id, b.name, b.logo, b.description, COUNT(p.id) AS product_count, b.sort_order, b.status, b.created_at, b.updated_at FROM brand b LEFT JOIN product p ON p.brand_id = b.id AND p.status = 1 WHERE b.id = #{id} GROUP BY b.id, b.name, b.logo, b.description, b.sort_order, b.status, b.created_at, b.updated_at LIMIT 1
